item.gtmoremachine.advanced_terminal.set: Set the priority level for automatic Tier Block placement (Click to open).
Number of repetitions of the structure
Used to set the number of repetitions for the placement of repeating parts in structures like distillation towers, assembly lines, etc.

Whether to enable the no-Hatch mode (OFF: not enabled, ON: enabled)
After enabling the no-Hatch mode, various Hatches will not be placed when they are not unique.

Whether to enable the Tier Block replace mode (OFF: not enabled, ON: enabled)
After enabling the Tier Block replace mode, all coils will be replaced by the Tier Block specified in the Tier Block setting.

Whether to use AE items (OFF: not use, ON: use)
After enabling 'Use AE Items', it will connect to the corresponding AE network via the AE Terminal in the inventory and use the items from it for construction.

Whether to enable Mirror Building (OFF: not enabled, ON: enabled)
After enabling Mirror Building, it will build the mirror image of all structures.

Whether to enable Dismantle mode (OFF: not enabled, ON: enabled)
After enabling Dismantle mode, it will dismantle the structural parts for which the number of repetitions has been set.
Warning: All blocks within the structure will be dismantled.
